transcript.clean_text: foreign is live and On Demand each and every day with a few stages remaining before Rome and the fight for pink blue and other jerseys still on timofino looking to take the blue jersey off of Ben Healy the pink supporters still around and everybody signing in looking for some success with just three stages after this one remaining Philly bodzana was the Italian Champion riding with Eddie Dunbar the Irishman Adam Welshman having his birthday in the mayaroza get right Thomas just the sixth Rider to wear the malarosa the race lead on his birthday stage 18 a very big one taking in several climbs five classified climbs before three coming in the final few kilometers 30 K's or just over in fact for those final three climbs a first finish in zoldo Alto since Paulo salvadeli beat Ivan basso back in the mid-naughties lots of climbing before a bigger Dolomite day the day after and a montelusari time trial on stage 20. and it was a full gas start the flat plane of the venator seeing Healy attack before and going out the back that meant that the king of the mountains points all went to tibolpino he was in the Breakaway and clawing points back on the Irishman a really solid Breakaway taking time but then allowed to take more time in the valley road before the final few climbs almost six minutes they had going into the third from last climb and inios grenadiers started to pull the pace Frenchman Pino had his heart broken just a few days ago and Switzerland would move into the king of the mountains lead again but what would primas roglich do hanging around at the back speculation of how he was feeling he would soon respond positively in the Breakaway it was again disappointment for Israel Premier Tech they were up there they were animating the race but Pino went away with Zana the Italian Champion G and frigo forced to chase on stepped up and started to increase the pace soon did for Joy while made up he needed Jay Vine to help him out and Garrett Thomas was also isolated from his teammates too Dunbar managed to stay with them roglitch would attack and distance Dunbar Thomas not losing a meter though under the final climb and again Chris doing his best Dunbar moving up in the GC despite losing a little bit of time I'll made her in the meantime trying to conserve his second place only 11 seconds were in it though between him and roglitch and when there was a mistake made by vine on The Descent that meant it would not happen so roglitch moving into second Almeida fighting for every second Thomas not budging up ahead almost a distraction in the end it was a stage win fight Pino in the same situation he'd be in a few days previous sprinting for the victory but once again he'd have his heart broken Philly bodzana a rider from the venator on the roads of the venator and in the Italian Champions jersey making it a dream come true second but going as king of the mountains and behind the GC battle raging on roglitch up to second now maida down to third Thomas as consistent as ever Eddie Dunbar moving up to Fourth Place Caruso down the fifth everybody battling for every place Victory though to Philly bodzana and Jayco alula they're having quite the tour of Italy another top four for Derek G and the Israel Premier Tech Team GC group at just under two minutes led by roglitch and Thomas a happy 37th birthday to Garrett Thomas not so happy day for Almeida but no disaster either 39 seconds between the top three three stages to go and everything still to play for the terrain on which to play too Bo Pino and his consolation was that maliazura a really good day in terms of the points but with plenty of points on offer the following day lots of Defending still to be done alien second base down now in third on 144 points five star stage the Dolomite monster stage tap Corner time starting in longarone and going up to Tre chimeo 2 304 meters will be the Chima copy the highest point going over roots that include Paso precrochi and pasojal the dolomites are a thing of beauty but as we know they look like heaven feel like hell vegetalia has three stages remaining and you can watch them all live and On Demand on gcn Plus
